title: paesia scaberula
intro: Paesia scaberula, also known as the Rough Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Paesia scaberula is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be applied topically to the skin, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
